title: BFDI Mouth Happy Ghast (n_bonnie2's Happier Ghasts)
description: a stupid clipart mouth from a not-so-obscure webseries plastered onto a happy fella
body:
# BFDI Mouth/Clipart Happy Ghast

This resource pack changes the happy ghast's smile to be of the BFDI Mouth
(if you don't know what Battle for Dream Island is... well too bad)

This only changes the happy ghast, not its baby variant, the ghastling.

i thought this would be funny as hell to make

[jacknjellify](https://www.youtube.com/@BFDI) for BFDI

_aka n_bonnie2's Happier Ghast_
